name: kitchen-desktop
author: Albert1711
description: Zasly Kitchen Pro - Kitchen Display System

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npx vite --port 5178 --strictPort" "wait-on http://localhost:5178 && set NODE_ENV=development && electron ."
scripts.electron:dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name electron,node,vite -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; $env:NODE_ENV='development'; $env:VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL='http://localhost:5178'; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath 'npx' -ArgumentList 'vite','--port','5178','--strictPort'; npx wait-on http://localhost:5178; electron ."
scripts.exe:pack: npm run build && electron-packager . "Zasly Kitchen Pro" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist_pack --overwrite --asar --icon=public/app-icon.png
